edited_markdown_blocks.markdown: The horizontal rule above is classified as locked_structural in the current codebase, despite being listed as editable_prose in the spec. See ideas/2026-03-route-classification-drift.md.
The expand macro and info panel below are locked_structural nodes. Headings and paragraphs around them are editable_prose.
This content is inside an expand macro. The expand node itself is locked_structural, though this inner paragraph is classified as editable_prose.
The verifier must confirm that no locked-node mutation occurs when editing adjacent prose sections.
The scope selector heading:Notes should isolate this section while leaving the expand macro and panel untouched.
This info panel is a locked_structural wrapper. Its inner paragraph is editable_prose, but the panel node itself must not be mutated by adjacent edits.
